decision.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

components.label: Form 990 net assets (accounting floor)
components.growth_driver: 990 net assets as reference floor for the nonprofit entity, not proven liquidation NAV.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

components.evidence: ProPublica Nonprofit Explorer EIN 11-1190044 FY2024 net assets $161,903,602 / provisional 3.46M shares ≈ $46.8. PDF not yet local [HUMAN REVIEW].
components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Accounting reference only until PDF and share count verified.
components.falsifier: Verified share count or Schedule D shows net assets per economic unit far from this band.

components.label: Cemetery operating franchise
components.growth_driver: Modest capitalization of cemetery cash earnings; land value is separate.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

components.evidence: FY2024 revenue ~$42.9M, expenses ~$37.5M, NI ~$5.3M. Capitalization of through-cycle owner cash pending audited statements.
components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Dividend claim must reconcile to NI.
components.falsifier: Operations cannot sustain distributions anywhere near the indicated $45.40 dividend under the provisional share count.

components.label: Land fair-value gap above 990 carrying amounts
components.ownership_claim: Land fair-value gap above 990 carrying amounts
components.growth_driver: Option on land mark-up; not double-counted inside form990_net_assets.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

components.evidence: Long Island cemetery land often carried below market on Form 990; Schedule D marks required. Wide option range until appraisal evidence.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Realization only via control transaction or gradual plot sales; not a dated payoff.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Base assigns modest probability of a material mark-up; high case is appraisal upside.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: No owner-funded development capital modeled; cemetery ops fund maintenance.

components.falsifier: Schedule D / appraisal shows no material gap above 990 carrying value.

components.label: OTC illiquidity and nonprofit-governance reserve
components.growth_driver: Large reserve until share count and dividend cash facts are verified.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

components.evidence: OTC Pink, tiny volume, 501(c)(13) constraints on distributions/control, unresolved share count that makes a $45.40 indicated dividend mathematically implausible at 3.46M shares versus $5.3M NI.
components.falsifier: Verified float and governance show minority common can realize NAV without the haircut.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only the terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Land fair-value gap above 990 carrying amounts

options.label: Land fair-value gap above 990 carrying amounts
options.ownership_claim: Land fair-value gap above 990 carrying amounts
options.growth_driver: Option on land mark-up; not double-counted inside form990_net_assets.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

options.evidence: Long Island cemetery land often carried below market on Form 990; Schedule D marks required. Wide option range until appraisal evidence.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Realization only via control transaction or gradual plot sales; not a dated payoff.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Base assigns modest probability of a material mark-up; high case is appraisal upside.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: No owner-funded development capital modeled; cemetery ops fund maintenance.

options.falsifier: Schedule D / appraisal shows no material gap above 990 carrying value.

optionality.rule: Every option requires a beneficiary, probability, timing, remaining capital, failure case, and non-overlap control; absence of option value must be explicit rather than unvalued.

committee.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

method_fit.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
applicability_tests: The security owns a legally enforceable economic claim on scarce assets or royalties.
Material value is omitted or poorly represented by current GAAP earnings.
Asset quantities, ownership, overlap, timing, and remaining capital can be reconciled.
Comparable values can be adjusted for location, quality, control, liquidity, and realization time.
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash

validation_cohort.purpose: Test depletion, commodity exposure, finite reserves, and royalty-unit reconciliation.
Test tangible capital, credit losses, funding, regulation, and excess-capital realization.
Test owner earnings, capital-light reinvestment, cyclicality, and buyback value creation.
Test normalized margins, industry supply response, replacement cost, and reinvestment timing.
Test product concentration, pipeline probabilities, patent cliffs, and catalyst timing.

method_fit.rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

attribution.explanation: The current component schedule is the first decision-grade baseline; attribution begins with the next dated valuation snapshot.
